zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Staverton於大約1448年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏姆諾時，她的父親Ralph Stafferton28歲，母親Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt22歲。她於1460年之前與Thomas Burgoyne II在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1506年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Staverton于大约1448年出生在英国英格兰波克夏姆諾时，她的父亲Ralph Stafferton28岁，母亲Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt22岁。她于1460年之前与Thomas Burgoyne II在英国坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1506年在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Staverton was born about 1448, in Cumnor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Stafferton, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, was 22. She married Thomas Burgoyne II before 1460, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1506, in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Staverton est née environ 1448, à Cumnor, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Stafferton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Burgoyne II avant 1460, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1506, à Stanton Long, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Staverton um 1448 in Cumnor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Stafferton 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt 22. Sie hat vor 1460 in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England Thomas Burgoyne II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1506 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Staverton è nata il circa 1448 nel Cumnor, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Stafferton, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Burgoyne II prima del 1460, nel Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Stavertonが約1448年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアクウムノーで生まれた時，父Ralph Staffertonは28歳，母Elizabeth d'Abridgecourtは22歳であった。1460年以前にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンでThomas Burgoyne IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1506年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ロングで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Staverton(이)가 대략 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 c너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Stafferton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1460년 이전 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 Thomas Burgoyne II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 론그에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Staverton nasceu aproximadamente 1448, em Cumnor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Stafferton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Burgoyne II antes 1460, em Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1506, em Stanton Long, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Staverton родилась около 1448 г. в местности кумнор, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Stafferton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Burgoyne II перед 1460 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1506 г. в местности стантон лонг, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Thomas Burgoyne II antes de 1460, en Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
